description: npm-style dependency resolution for AI coding CLI hooks (Claude Code, Cursor, Gemini CLI)

sources.provides: CLI command handlers (init, install, uninstall, update, list, check, diff, rebuild, doctor, restore, import, migrate)
Core TypeScript types: ServiceManifest, HookDeclaration, UhrLockfile, Conflict, PlatformId
Conflict detection engine — all conflict types and detection logic
Full technical specification — authoritative source for behavior, lockfile schema, platform semantics

outputs.audience: AI agents integrating with or building on UHR
